description_long: This is a sturdy, rectangular laboratory or utility cabinet with a black countertop and a wooden base. The front features two cabinet doors on the left, each with a metallic handle, and three horizontal drawers on the right, each equipped with long, metallic handles. Above the countertop, two vertical metal rods support a horizontal bar, possibly for hanging equipment or tools. The wood grain is visible on all sides of the base, giving it a natural and professional appearance. The black countertop appears smooth and durable, suitable for supporting heavy objects or equipment. The overall design suggests it is intended for use in environments such as workshops, laboratories, or garages.
description: A robust wooden cabinet with a black countertop, featuring drawers, doors, and a metal overhead bar, suitable for utility or laboratory use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the wooden panel and the black countertop, with the metal support bar visible on top.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the full width of the wooden back panel and the metal bar above the countertop.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the wooden side and the black countertop with the metal bar.
description_view_3: Front view highlighting two cabinet doors with handles, three drawers with long handles, and the overhead metal bar.
